payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Interior rectangular window with a white frame and closed white horizontal slatted blinds filling the opening; dark navy curtains flank both sides and the lower-left blind slats are slightly misaligned with minor occlusion from a wooden piece of furniture at the bottom-left; approximate distance from camera ~2.0 m.
